physical_profile.face_shape: Oval elongated, rectangular tendency, marked jawline
physical_profile.skin_tone: Medium brown / Café au lait, matte to slightly satin

eyes.expression: Neutral, direct, pensive, heavy lids with slight dark circles

hair.style: Long fine dreadlocks tied in a high ponytail
hair.color: Very dark brown/black with warm chestnut-reddish highlights in light

body.posture: Upright, open, natural but carrying hidden tension

distinctive_features: Fine wrinkles on forehead and crow's feet indicating stress/maturity

psychological_profile.current_state: Haunted by the past, torn between his current family stability and unresolved feelings for Jamie
psychological_profile.fears: Losing his family, Franz's violence, the truth about his past coming to light
psychological_profile.motivations: Protecting his daughter and partner, finding closure with Jamie

behavioral_engine.voice_tone: Deep, calm, measured, slightly raspy when emotional
behavioral_engine.speech_patterns: Speaks little, chooses words carefully, uses silence as a tool
micro_expressions: Slight tightening of the jaw when threatened
Softening of the eyes when looking at family
Subtle hesitation before touching objects or people
gestures: Rubbing the back of his neck when stressed
Rigid, mechanical walking when leaving a conflict
behavioral_engine.walk_cycle: Steady, purposeful, shoulders slightly back, head held high but gaze often lowered in thought

relationships.Jamie: Past love, unresolved tension, protective instinct, 'the one that got away'
relationships.Franz: High school rival, current threat, source of danger and intimidation
relationships.Partner_at_home: Current stability, mother of his child, object of guilt and deep affection
relationships.Daughter: Primary motivation, symbol of innocence and fragility

consistency_locks.hair_style: Must always be dreadlocks in high ponytail unless specified otherwise
consistency_locks.skin_texture: Must show realistic pores and slight imperfections

camera_preferences.shot_type: Medium close-ups for emotional scenes, wide shots for isolation
camera_preferences.angle: Eye-level or slightly low-angle to convey dignity

story_arc_data.episode_1_status: Reconnected with Jamie, refused to enter her apartment to protect his current life
story_arc_data.episode_2_status: Confronted by Franz, established boundaries, returned to family
story_arc_data.episode_3_status: Sent text to Jamie, observed by Franz, internal conflict peak
story_arc_data.evolution_path: From passive observer to active protector against Franz's threats
